title: Postpartum Restorative Sessions
alt: A stone sculpture of a mother tenderly cradling her child
description: The postpartum season asks an extraordinary amount from the body, mind, and nervous system. These in-home sessions are designed to offer intentional rest and support during a season often marked by exhaustion, transition, overstimulation, and continual giving of oneself. Sessions include restorative positioning with supportive props and pillows, facial relaxation using Gua Sha, guided meditation, introductory breathwork, and a one-hour immersive sound experience designed to support nervous system regulation, emotional grounding, and full-body rest — bringing care directly into the home.
